name: An Istanbul Story
overview:
Experience the drama in drama’s capital. Masks fall in the heart of İstanbul's magnificent streets, where a romantic film set quickly turns into a fierce reckoning of passion, rage, and jealousy.

In this 10-episode series, join Ozan Akbaba and Sinem Ünsal as they tell “An İstanbul Story”

trailers.title: An İstanbul Story | Official Trailer – Go Türkiye’s New İstanbul Series
